paragraph_or_text_span: Second edition 6 July 2021 | Guideline Download (3.3 MB)

heading_path: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention
paragraph_or_text_span: This WHO and HRP guideline is designed to help countries make faster progress, more equitably, on the screening and treatment of cervical cancer. It includes some important shifts in WHO’s recommended approaches to cervical screening, and includes a total of 23 recommendations and 7 good practice statements.
